subject: Machop, a small grey humanoid creature in a flexed or ready fighting stance
description: A small, blue-grey humanoid creature stands in a martial pose, one arm raised. The figure has a muscular compact build, three ridge-like fins on its head, a simple face, and a short tail. The background suggests a warm outdoor setting — an open area with warm yellows and earth tones. The creature's raised arm and wide stance suggest a martial arts ready position. This is a classic original-series illustration style with clean flat linework.
foreground: small grey humanoid creature with fins on head, arm raised in fighting stance
background: warm outdoor setting with earth tones
